annotations.grafana.app/message: Align traffic spike heatmap with current 5 browser VU config

spec.description: Static Graphviz heatmap generated from load-tests/grafana-cloud-traffic-spikes.js defaults, using one WCAG AA-friendly off-white text color across darkened color-coded cells.
spec.title: Traffic spike target heatmap - dark mode

spec.description: Static HTML heatmap generated from the current traffic-spike k6 defaults, using one WCAG AA-friendly off-white text color across darkened color-coded cells.
spec.title: Traffic spike target heatmap - HTML

options.content:
Traffic Spike Test Targets

Stage VUs Requests / wave Cart updates Checkout attempts Region changes
Warmup / Recovery 25 100 15 5 25
Spike 1 100 400 60 20 100
Spike 2 200 800 120 40 200
Spike 3 400 1600 240 80 400

Config: base=100, multiplier=2.
Regional shoppers: 30 VUs.
Storefront actions: 60 browser VUs.
Duration: 15m. Brighter cells mean more target pressure per completed wave.
